top3.sql:
SELECT 
    cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales cs1
JOIN customer c ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_year = d1.d_year + 1
)
GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name,...

SELECT 
    cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales cs1
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer c ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
WHERE d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
GROUP BY cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name
ORDER BY cs1....

SELECT 
    cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales cs1
JOIN customer c ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_year = d1.d_year + 1
)
GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name,...

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name
FROM customer c
JOIN catalog_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_year = d1.d_year + 1
)
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name
ORDER BY ...

SELECT 
    cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales cs1
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
JOIN store_sales ss2 ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = ss2.ss_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss2.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
JOIN customer c ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
WHERE d1.d_year = d2.d_year - 1
GROUP BY cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name
ORDER BY cs1....

SELECT 
    cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales cs1
JOIN customer c ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_year = d1.d_year + 1
)
GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name,...

SELECT DISTINCT
    cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales
JOIN date_dim cd ON catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = cd.d_date_sk
JOIN customer ON catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
WHERE cd.d_year IN (2001, 2002)
  AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM store_sales
      JOIN date_dim sd ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = sd.d_date_sk
      WHERE store_sales.ss_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
  ...

SELECT 
    c.c_customer_sk,
    c.c_customer_id,
    c.c_first_name,
    c.c_last_name
FROM customer c
JOIN catalog_sales cs ON c.c_customer_sk = cs.cs_bill_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_year = d1.d_year + 1
)
GROUP BY c.c_customer_sk, c.c_customer_id, c.c_first_name, c.c_last_name
ORDER BY ...

final.sql:
SELECT 
    cs_bill_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
    c_customer_id,
    c_first_name,
    c_last_name
FROM catalog_sales cs1
JOIN customer c ON cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN date_dim d1 ON cs1.cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM store_sales ss
    JOIN date_dim d2 ON ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    WHERE ss.ss_customer_sk = cs1.cs_bill_customer_sk
      AND d2.d_year = d1.d_year + 1
)
GROUP BY cs_bill_customer_sk, c_customer_id, c_first_name,...
